creator: hvo.pm@xs4all.nl
text:
After updating databases/p5-DBI to p5-DBI-1.613 my CSV app does not work anymore.
In the build of p5-DBI-1.613 is a warning:
***
    This version of DBI conflicts with the version of
    module SQL::Statement (1.27) you have installed.

    It's strongly recommended that you update it after
    installing this version of DBI.
***
But p5-SQL-Statement-1.27 is the newest in /usr/ports

How-To-Repeat: portmaster -r p5-DBI
